recommendations.title: Almost Christmas
recommendations.overview: A dysfunctional family gathers together for their first Christmas since the death of their matriarch.

recommendations.title: El Camino Christmas
recommendations.overview: A young man seeking a father he has never met, through no fault of his own, ends up barricaded in a liquor store with five other people on Christmas Eve in the fictitious town of El Camino, NV.

recommendations.title: Jingle Jangle: A Christmas Journey
recommendations.overview: An imaginary world comes to life in a holiday tale of an eccentric toymaker, his adventurous granddaughter, and a magical invention that has the power to change their lives forever.

recommendations.title: Baggage Claim
recommendations.overview: Although she has traveled all over the world, flight attendant Montana Moore has yet to find a man with whom she wants to settle down. However, with her sister's upcoming wedding and pressure from her oft-married mother, she's determined to get engag

recommendations.title: Pusher
recommendations.overview: A drug pusher grows increasingly desperate after a botched deal leaves him with a large debt to a ruthless drug lord.

recommendations.title: Saturn in Opposition
recommendations.overview: This film focuses on contemporary 30- and 40-somethings trying to make sense of their lives in an age in which the old certainties have disappeared. Lorenzo and Davide make their lives together within a circle that includes Antonio and Angelica, marr

recommendations.title: Day Shift
recommendations.overview: An LA vampire hunter has a week to come up with the cash to pay for his kid's tuition and braces. Trying to make a living these days just might kill him.

recommendations.title: 7 Minutes
recommendations.overview: When three young criminals lose a stash of drugs, they end up owing money to a ruthless drug lord. With time running out, they plan a daring robbery to raise the cash to settle the debt.

recommendations.title: Vai Que Dá Certo
recommendations.overview: 5 friends have a plan to rob a transporter that can change their lives.

recommendations.title: WWE WrestleMania 36: Part 1
recommendations.overview: The first night of the 36th annual WrestleMania event being held at the WWE Performance Center in Orlando, Florida, hosted by former New England Patriots Tight End Rob Gronkowski.
